entries.title: Homily on Acts 47 on acts 22:2
entries.excerpt: "And when they heard that he spake in the Hebrew tongue to them, they kept the more silence." Do you observe how the using the same tongue subdued them? In fact, they had a sort of awe for that language.

entries.title: Commentary on Acts on acts 22:2
entries.excerpt: "And when they heard that he spoke… in the Hebrew language." You see how it affected them that he spoke the same language as they did — they had a certain kind of respect for that language.
